name: [GRIDHAND] Competitor Monitor Agent - Monthly: competitor comparison report → email to client

gridhand.scenario: Monthly: competitor comparison report → email to client
gridhand.description: Every month, on the first day at 8am, a workflow is triggered that automatically compiles a competitor comparison report for Smith's Auto Repair, a local car repair shop, by aggregating data from online review sites like Yelp and Google Reviews, as well as social media platforms, and then emails the report to the owner, John Smith, via Gmail, providing him with valuable insights into how his business stacks up against the competition in terms of pricing, customer satisfaction, and overall reputation. This report enables John to make data-driven decisions to adjust his marketing strategy, pricing, and services to stay ahead of the competition and attract more customers. By receiving this monthly report, John can promptly identify areas for improvement and capitalize on new opportunities, ultimately driving more sales and revenue for his business.
